project_dialog.title: Projet ya sika
project_dialog.description: Pesa yango kombo pe pona mode ya enregistrement.
project_dialog.name_placeholder: e.g. Mbula ya Eleko ya Moyi

album_dialog.title: Album ya sika
album_dialog.description: Groupe ba projets relatifs na album moko.

album.empty: Nanu projet moko te na album oyo.
album.delete_confirm_description: Ba projets eko effacer te, kaka sans lien na " {{name}} ".

delete_project.confirm_description: Yango elongolaka projet mpe nionso kozua na kati na yango. Oyo ekoki kozongisama sima te.

record.title: Enregistrer
record.subtitle: Capture a clean take, tala ba niveaux na yo, pe landa script.
record.device_empty: Ba dispositifs ya entrée ezwami te.

guide.title: Session oyo etambwisami
guide.subtitle: Tika molakisi atambolisa yo na kati ya script litambe na litambe, kobanda na kozongisa molunge kino na fraze oyo balobaka.
guide.unavailable: Session guidée ezali nanu te na serveur.
guide.select_project_device: Pona projet moko na dispositif ya entrée pona ko enregistrer ba étapes kaka depuis awa.
guide.no_record_step: Etape ya kozongisa molunge — enregistrement moko te esengeli.
guide.complete_body: O enregistrer ba étapes nionso ya script. Zongela na onglet Audio ya projet mpe pona ba prises oyo olingaka mingi.

best2min.hint: Ezali kosala analyse ya énergie mpe ya clarté likolo ya kozua mobimba mpo na koluka fenêtre na yango ya makasi ya 2 minutes — okoki kaka ko ajuster portée na maboko sima.
best2min.unavailable: Analyse ya best-2-minutes ezali nanu te na serveur oyo.

record.takes_empty: Pas de takes enregistré na session oyo nanu.
record.ws_disconnected: Kozongisa boyokani na niveau ya compteur...

no_takes.title: Pas ezuaka nanu
no_takes.description: Enregistrer take ya sika to importer fichier oyo ezali.

audio.delete_take_confirm_description: Audio brut na version nionso oyo esalemi ekolongolama.
audio.session_label_placeholder: Étiquette ya session (ekoki kozala ya bolingi) .

pipeline.title: Monyololo ya kosala mosala
pipeline.stage_requires_extra: Esengaka extra oyo e installé te

export.title: Exportation kozua
export.description: Bosala fisyé ya suka uta na version oyo esalemi.

notes.placeholder: Notes ya forme libre sur projet oyo...

lyrics.placeholder: Koma maloba ya nzembo awa. Salelá palette oyo ezali na mopanzi mpo na kokɔtisa ba méta-étiquettes ya Suno.
lyrics.versions_empty: Naino ba versions oyo ebombami te.
lyrics.restore_confirm_description: Mokanda ya lelo ekozwa esika ya version oyo ebombami na {{date}} .
lyrics.metatags_hint: Finá elembo moko mpo na kokɔtisa yango na curseur.
lyrics.metatags_placebo_warning: Unproven — ekoki kozala na effet moko te na résultat.

prompts.preview_empty: Pona modèle mpe tondisa ba variables mpo na komona aperçu.
prompts.char_count_warning: Ba prompts ya style koleka 1000 caractères ekoki kozua truncated na Suno.

stems.title: Vocals na guitare
stems.empty: Take oyo ekabwani nanu te. Kima séparation po yoka vocal na guitare na isolement.
stems.capability_missing: Bokabwani ya source ezali installé te na serveur oyo.
stems.unavailable: Separation vocal/guitar ezali nanu te na serveur oyo.

import.title: Kokɔtisa biloko na mboka mopaya
import.subtitle: Mema ba projets oyo ezali déjà na disque na bibliothèque.

step1.title: Boluka dossier
step1.description: Lakisa na dossier ya misisa na ba projets na ba piste na yo.
step1.ffmpeg_warning: FFmpeg ezwami te — ba fichiers oyo esengeli kobongwana eko sauter.

step2.title: Bozongela makambo
step2.description: Tala ba kombo, ba statuts, pe nini eko kotisama avant o confirmer.

step3.title: Kokɔtisa biloko na mboka mopaya
step3.description: Confirmer pona ko copier ba fichiers pe ko créer ba projets.
step3.copy_originals: Kopi ya ba fichiers originales na bibliothèque
step3.done_description: Ba projets oyo ezali awa na se esalemaki na bibliothèque na bino.

templates.title: Modèles ya kosala
templates.subtitle: Modèles ya prompt oyo ekoki kosalelama lisusu mpe ba méta-étiquettes mpo na Suno.

editor.template_hint: Mark esika variable moko na moko ezali ya na kombo na yango ezingami na ba parenthèses doubles bouclées — ndakisa, variable oyo ezali na kombo "genre" ekomi genre enveloppé na ba parenthèses mibale ya bofungoli mpe mibale ya bokangami.

metatags.title: Ba méta-étiquettes
metatags.subtitle: Structural na style tags Suno ayebi na kati ya ba paroles.

tier_legend.1: Niveau 1 — oyo ezali na mikanda mpe oyo ezali na boyokani

settings.title: Ba paramètres
settings.subtitle: Ba informations ya système, monoko, na ba préférences par défaut.
settings.gpu_none: Ba fournisseurs ya GPU moko te ba détecté
settings.lufs_target_hint: Esalemi lokola likanisi ya kobanda tango ya exportation ezuaka. Par défaut ya Suno efandi nzinga nzinga ya -14 LUFS.

guide.title: Guide ya enregistrement ya Suno
guide.subtitle: Ndenge nini kokanga mongongo na guitare ezuaka oyo ezuaka ba résultats ya malamu.
guide.intro: Suno esalaka malamu koleka na ba références ya propre, sans ambiguïté. Buku oyo etali bolengeli, nivo ya mikano, mpe script ya bokangami ya miniti 3–5.

prep.title: Komibongisa
prep.body: Enregistrer na chambre oyo esalemi na traitement to oyo ezali na ebele ya matériel doux (rido, tapis, bilamba na armoire). Boma ba ventilateurs na eloko nionso oyo ezo hums. Chauffer mongongo na yo pendant 5 minutes avant o enregistrer.

levels.title: Niveau: -12 kino -6 dBFS
levels.body: Boluka ba sommets entre -12 na -6 dBFS na compteur. Na nse ya esika yango, makɛlɛlɛ ya nsima ekómaka komonana mingi; likolo na yango, likama ya kokata emati. Salelá métre oyo ezali na lokasa Enregistrer mpo na kotya gain na yo liboso ya kobanda.

distance.title: Distance ya mic: 15–30 cm
distance.body: Tikala na ntaka ya santimɛtrɛ 15 tii 30 longwa na mikro. Pene koleka wana elekisaka ndelo na ba plosives mpe effet de proximité; mosika ezuaka reverb ya chambre mingi na makelele.

script.title: Script ya enregistrement
script.vowels: Bavoyelle oyo eumelaka — a, e, i, o, u
script.scales: Ba échelles simples, likolo mpe na se
script.dynamics: Dynamique: kobanda na doux, suka na mongongo makasi
script.spoken_phrase: Phrase moko oyo elobelami, mpo Suno akoka kotanga ton ya mongongo na yo

expectations.title: Oyo Suno azali kozela
expectations.body: WAV, 48 kHz, mono, sec (reverb to effets te), 3 à 5 minutes ya référence. 2 minutes oyo eleki peto, oyo ezali représentant mingi ya kozua mbala mingi ebimisaka ba résultats ya malamu koleka.

suno_voice_full.name: Script vocal mobimba ya Suno
suno_voice_full.desc: Miniti 5 oyo etambwisami: kozongisa molunge, bavoyelle, ba échelles, biteni mibale ya nzembo, dynamique, mpe fraze moko oyo balobaka.

step.warmup_inst: Longola yango na kolɛmba, kolɛmba mbɛbu (brrr), mpe konguluma ya pɛtɛɛ na boumeli ya miniti soki moko. Pas besoin ya ko enregistrer — ezali kaka pona ko relaxer zolo na yo avant oyemba.
step.vowels_inst: Simbá mongongo mokomoko — a, e, i, o, u — na boumeli ya segɔnde 3 to 4 na mongongo na yo ya malamu, na mongongo ya kokita te. Yango esalisaka Suno azwa timbre ya peto ya mongongo na yo.
step.scales: Ba échelles likolo mpe na se
step.scales_inst: Yemba échelle moko ya pete likolo pe sima na se, na "la" to "na". Esengeli te kozala ya kokoka — mokano ezali ya kosala carte ya portée vocale na yo.
step.section_inst: Yemba 8 à 16 barres ya nzembo, na vrai intention oyo olingi ko transmettre. Prioriser clarté mpe présence na esika ya perfection technique.
step.section2_inst: Yemba ba barres mosusu 8 to 16 — malamu mingi chorus to eteni oyo ekeseni na oyo ya liboso. Kosala makambo ndenge na ndenge mingi esalisaka modɛlɛ ayeba mongongo na yo.
step.dynamics_inst: Yemba fraze moko kobanda na pete mingi mpe kosuka na mongongo makasi, kozanga kotungisa zolo na yo. Yango elakisaka Suno gamme dynamique ya mongongo na yo.
step.spoken_inst: Loba — koyemba te — fraze mokuse, ya bomoto, lokola nde ozali kosolola. Yango esalisaka Suno ayeba vrai timbre ya mongongo na yo.

stages.quality: Bobongisi ya lolenge ya malamu (ya likolo) .

errors.device_busy: Dispositif audio ezali kosalelama na programme mosusu.
errors.ffmpeg_missing: FFmpeg ezali installé te — installer yango pona ko convertir fichier oyo.
errors.permission_denied: Ndingisa eboyamaki mpo na nzela oyo epesami.
errors.process_failed: Elongi te kosala mosala ya kozwa.
